name: blockish
description: Example block scaffolded with Create Block tool.
author: The WordPress Contributors

scripts.release:check: npm run build && php -l blockish.php && find includes -name '*.php' -print0 | xargs -0 -n1 php -l && npm run zip
scripts.zip: npm run build && rm -rf blockish blockish.zip blockish-v.$npm_package_version.zip && rsync -a --exclude-from=.buildignore . blockish && zip -qr blockish-v.$npm_package_version.zip blockish
